mapper.insert: MERGE INTO BOOK_CART BC USING DUAL ON ( BC.MEMBER_NO = #{ bookCart.memberNo } AND BC.BOOK_ITEMID = #{ bookCart.itemId } ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET BC.BOOKCART_COUNT = BC.BOOKCART_COUNT + #{ bookCart.count }, BC.BOOKCART_TIMESTAMP = sysdate WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MEMBER_NO, BOOK_ITEMID, BOOKCART_COUNT, BOOKCART_TIMESTAMP) VALUES (#{ bookCart.memberNo }, #{ bookCart.itemId }, #{ bookCart.count }, sysdate)
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_NO, BOOK_ITEMID, BOOKCART_COUNT, BOOKCART_TIMESTAMP FROM BOOK_CART WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{ memberNo } ORDER BY BOOKCART_TIMESTAMP DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM BOOK_CART WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{ memberNo } AND BOOK_ITEMID = #{ itemId }
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO BOOK_LIKE BL USING DUAL ON ( BL.MEMBER_NO = #{ memberNo } AND BL.BOOK_ITEMID = #{ itemId } ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET BL.BOOKLIKE_TIMESTAMP = sysdate DELETE WHERE BL.MEMBER_NO = #{ memberNo } AND BL.BOOK_ITEMID = #{ itemId } WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MEMBER_NO, BOOK_ITEMID, BOOKLIKE_TIMESTAMP) VALUES (#{ memberNo }, #{ itemId }, sysdate)
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_NO, BOOK_ITEMID, BOOKLIKE_TIMESTAMP FROM BOOK_LIKE WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{ memberNo } AND BOOK_ITEMID = #{ itemId }
